message:
fix(messaging): saturating priority arithmetic and ControlRecovery degradation disposition

Two policy improvements:

1. **Saturating priority arithmetic (effective_priority)**: Priority
   calculation now uses saturating_add() for all boost components
   instead of plain addition, preventing overflow when multiple high
   boosts stack (e.g. urgent + deadline + obligation load).

2. **ControlRecovery degradation disposition**: Adds the missing
   ControlRecovery arm to degradation_disposition(), returning
   WidenRepair.  Control/recovery traffic is documented as 'must
   stay live' — rejecting it would grow semantic debt, so the
   policy widens the repair budget instead.

Test: control_recovery_widens_repair_when_degraded verifies the
WidenRepair disposition and exercises the full degradation path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
